verses.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD from the heavens; Praise Him in the heights!
verses.2: Praise Him, all His angels; Praise Him, all His heavenly armies!
verses.3: Praise Him, sun and moon; Praise Him, all stars of light!
verses.4: Praise Him, highest heavens, And the waters that are above the heavens!
verses.5: They are to praise the name of the LORD, For He commanded and they were created.
verses.6: He has also established them forever and ever; He has made a decree, and it will not pass away.
verses.7: Praise the LORD from the earth, Sea monsters, and all the ocean depths;
verses.8: Fire and hail, snow and clouds; Stormy wind, fulfilling His word;
verses.9: Mountains and all hills; Fruit trees and all cedars;
verses.10: Animals and all cattle; Crawling things and winged fowl;
verses.11: Kings of the earth and all peoples; Rulers and all judges of the earth;
verses.12: Both young men and virgins; Old men and children.
verses.13: They are to praise the name of the LORD, For His name alone is exalted; His majesty is above earth and heaven.
verses.14: And He has lifted up a horn for His people, Praise for all His godly ones, For the sons of Israel, a people near to Him. Praise the LORD!
